title: schoutenia accrescens
intro: Schoutenia accrescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the Borneo scrub turmeric. The plant has been used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoutenia accrescens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of fever. Herbal preparations of Schoutenia accrescens are typically made into teas or infusions, and it can also be used as a spice in cooking.
